creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the report.

In fact, I have applied this update to my local copy of the port, waiting to be tested and committed, 2 momnths ago.

But there was no version of Wine that I could install at that time, and I forgot about this update. Testing is necessary, since I changed some of the FreeBSD specific scripts, based on some other bug report.

I'll see that I get the scripts tested and that other bug report resolved within the next one or two weeks ...
